jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Miniklub - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
